query: We're considering opening a new distribution centre in Wroclaw, Poland to serve our growing EU customer base. Can you compare our current UK-only network against a dual-DC setup?
What happens to our supply chain if the Suez Canal is disrupted for 3 months? We ship 60% of inbound materials via that route from South-East Asia
We just acquired a company with overlapping distribution in the Midlands — should we consolidate into one DC or keep both? Model the scenarios for me
Our demand in the Nordics has grown 35% this year. Should we add a Scandinavian warehouse or continue serving from our Dutch DC? I need a break-even volume analysis
with all these tariff changes, we're thinking about nearshoring some production from China to Turkey. can you model what that does to our total landed cost and transit times?
If fuel costs rise another 20%, which of our current network scenarios becomes most robust? We're trying to future-proof the design
We need to decide between cross-docking in Frankfurt vs holding inventory in a full DC there. The trade-off is service level vs inventory carrying cost. Can you run the scenario analysis?
Our company is evaluating reshoring our electronics assembly from Shenzhen back to the UK. What are the total network cost implications including facility, labour, logistics, and customs?
Help me define the objective function for our network optimisation — should we optimise for cost, service level, or carbon? We're trying to hit a 30% Scope 3 reduction target
What's the break-even volume for justifying a new DC in the Czech Republic? Current setup is Birmingham only, serving 500 orders/month to Central Europe
Review our top 5 carrier OTD rates and produce a quarterly performance scorecard with damage claims and cost per kg
Reconcile this invoice from Brenntag against the PO and goods receipt — quantities don't match
Analyze our procurement spend by category and find vendor consolidation opportunities
Our strategic steel supplier's credit rating just dropped to CCC — assess the risk across all five dimensions
Draft a non-renewal notice for our packaging contract with Global Packaging Ltd — the notice deadline is in 30 days
Generate the weekly supply chain brief for the CPO — traffic lights, contract calendar, and savings pipeline
Help me classify a new vendor using the Kraljic matrix — they're our only source for a custom machined part
Our expedited freight is 18% of total freight spend. What's the root cause — is it a logistics or upstream problem?
Write a corrective action letter to our steel supplier about their declining OTD trend — they've been below 90% for 3 months
Build me a transportation management dashboard in Python that pulls data from our TMS API
